title: gymnogramma ambigua
intro: Gymnogramma ambigua, also known as the sensitive fern of the new world, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gymnogramma ambigua include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Gymnogramma ambigua can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
